glosses.ja: 疲れた; くたびれた

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 1st person singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective meaning “weary,” masculine singular agreeing with the (understood) masculine subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the whole clause.

sentences.target: Tu es las de répéter la même chose.
sentences.reading: /ty ɛ la də ʁepete la mɛm ʃoz/

translations.fr: Tu es las de répéter la même chose.
translations.ipa: /ty ɛ la də ʁepete la mɛm ʃoz/
translations.en: You're tired of repeating the same thing.
translations.es: Estás cansado de repetir lo mismo.
translations.de: Du bist es leid, immer dasselbe zu wiederholen.
translations.it: Sei stanco di ripetere sempre la stessa cosa.
translations.ko: 너는 같은 말을 반복하는 게 지겨워.
translations.zh-Hans: 你厌倦了重复同样的话。
translations.ru: Ты устал повторять одно и то же.
translations.pt: Você está cansado de repetir a mesma coisa.
translations.he: אתה עייף מלחזור על אותו דבר.
translations.vi: Bạn mệt mỏi vì phải lặp lại cùng một điều.
translations.ar: أنت متعب من تكرار الشيء نفسه.
translations.nl: Je bent het zat om steeds hetzelfde te herhalen.
translations.uk: Ти втомився повторювати одне й те саме.
translations.hi: तुम एक ही बात बार-बार दोहराते-दोहराते थक गए हो।
translations.el: Έχεις βαρεθεί να επαναλαμβάνεις το ίδιο πράγμα.
translations.nb: Du er lei av å gjenta det samme.
translations.id: Kamu lelah mengulang hal yang sama.
translations.sv: Du är trött på att upprepa samma sak.
translations.ro: Ești sătul să repeți mereu același lucru.
translations.cs: Už tě unavuje opakovat pořád to samé.
translations.da: Du er træt af at gentage det samme.
translations.ja: 同じことを繰り返すのにうんざりしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 2nd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective meaning “weary,” masculine singular agreeing with the subject.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement (de + infinitive) expressing what one is weary of.
Infinitive verb complement governed by de; head of the infinitival phrase.
Definite article (feminine singular) determining the noun phrase.
Adjective meaning “same,” agreeing with the noun (feminine singular) and modifying chose.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the noun phrase determined by la and modified by même.

sentences.target: Il est las après ce long trajet.
sentences.reading: /il ɛ la apʁɛ sə lɔ̃ tʁaʒɛ/

translations.fr: Il est las après ce long trajet.
translations.ipa: /il ɛ la apʁɛ sə lɔ̃ tʁaʒɛ/
translations.en: He is weary after that long journey.
translations.es: Está cansado después de ese largo viaje.
translations.de: Er ist nach dieser langen Reise erschöpft.
translations.it: È stanco dopo quel lungo viaggio.
translations.ko: 그는 그 긴 여행 후에 지쳤다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在那趟漫长的旅程后很疲惫。
translations.yue: 佢喺嗰段漫長嘅旅程之後好攰。
translations.ru: Он устал после этого долгого пути.
translations.pt: Ele está cansado depois daquela longa viagem.
translations.he: הוא עייף אחרי המסע הארוך הזה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy mệt sau chuyến đi dài đó.
translations.ar: هو متعب بعد تلك الرحلة الطويلة.
translations.nl: Hij is moe na die lange reis.
translations.uk: Він втомився після тієї довгої подорожі.
translations.hi: वह उस लंबी यात्रा के बाद थक गया है।
translations.pl: Jest zmęczony po tej długiej podróży.
translations.el: Είναι κουρασμένος μετά από εκείνο το μακρύ ταξίδι.
translations.nb: Han er sliten etter den lange reisen.
translations.id: Dia lelah setelah perjalanan panjang itu.
translations.sv: Han är trött efter den långa resan.
translations.ro: Este obosit după acea călătorie lungă.
translations.cs: Je unavený po té dlouhé cestě.
translations.da: Han er træt efter den lange rejse.
translations.fi: Hän on väsynyt tuon pitkän matkan jälkeen.
translations.ja: 彼はその長い旅のあとで疲れている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (3rd person singular); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective meaning “weary,” masculine singular.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) for trajet.
Attributive adjective (masculine singular) modifying trajet.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the prepositional object of après.

sentences.target: Ils sont las d'attendre le bus.

translations.fr: Ils sont las d'attendre le bus.
translations.en: They are tired of waiting for the bus.
translations.es: Están cansados de esperar el autobús.
translations.de: Sie sind es leid, auf den Bus zu warten.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们厌倦了等待公交车。
translations.pt: Eles estão cansados de esperar o ônibus.
translations.vi: Họ mệt mỏi vì phải chờ xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ze zijn het zat om op de bus te wachten.
translations.hi: वे बस का इंतज़ार करते-करते थक गए हैं।
translations.el: Είναι κουρασμένοι να περιμένουν το λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: De er lei av å vente på bussen.
translations.sv: De är trötta på att vänta på bussen.
translations.cs: Jsou unavení z čekání na autobus.
translations.da: De er trætte af at vente på bussen.
translations.ja: 彼らはバスを待つのにうんざりしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (3rd person plural); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person plural) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective meaning “weary,” masculine plural (form identical to masculine singular in spelling).
Elided form of the preposition de before a vowel; introduces the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement governed by d'; head of the infinitival phrase.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining bus.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of attendre within the infinitival phrase.
